messages: {"parts":[{"content":"Let me also fix that broken BUILD_LESSONS.json properly:","id":null,"provider_name":null,"provider_details":null,"part_kind":"text"},{"tool_name":"run_bash_command","args":"{\"cmd\": \"python3 -c \\\"\\nimport json\\nwith open('N5/builds/meeting-system-v3/BUILD_LESSONS.json') as f:\\n    content = f.read()\\n# Find the valid JSON portion\\ndepth = 0\\nend = 0\\nfor i, c in enumerate(content):\\n    if c == '{': depth += 1\\n    elif c == '}': \\n        depth -= 1\\n        if depth == 0:\\n            end = i + 1\\n            break\\nvalid = content[:end]\\ndata = json.loads(valid)\\nwith open('N5/builds/meeting-system-v3/BUILD_LESSONS.json', 'w') as f:\\n    json.dump(data, f, indent=2)\\nprint('Fixed!')\\n\\\"\"}","tool_call_id":"toolu_01B6VSdLmV6fXDxEToeEyQo5","id":null,"provider_name":null,"provider_details":null,"part_kind":"tool-call"}],"usage":{"input_tokens":82885,"cache_write_tokens":74490,"cache_read_tokens":8394,"output_tokens":251,"input_audio_tokens":0,"cache_audio_read_tokens":0,"output_audio_tokens":0,"details":{"cache_creation_input_tokens":74490,"cache_read_input_tokens":8394,"input_tokens":1,"output_tokens":251}},"model_name":"claude-opus-4-5-20251101","timestamp":"2026-02-06T20:20:28.876028Z","kind":"response","provider_name":"anthropic","provider_url":"https://api.anthropic.com","provider_details":{"finish_reason":"tool_use","zo_persona_id":"3700edcc-9785-4dee-9530-ad4a440293d9","zo_persona_name":"Vibe Operator"},"provider_response_id":"msg_01QHfR2fHZybP7YpMr47tCHi","finish_reason":"tool_call","run_id":"0610b4cc-02a3-4fc3-83c7-79b272917033","metadata":null}
